items.channel_label: Jack Roberts — UK tech founder, 7-figure AI automation business
items.title: The laziest developer writes the best code
items.description:
The best developers write the least code. ponytail just taught AI the same lesson.

First question: does this code need to exist? Shortest path. Standard tools before custom ones.

ponytail applied that to AI coding. 20K stars on GitHub. Free to use.

Like hiring the laziest developer on the team. Turns out they write the best code.

Less code. Fewer bugs. Faster builds.

#ponytail #github #aicoding #firstprinciples #opensource

items.title: He’ll be world champion one day… 🥹
items.description:
2 years ago, I met Jonathan, an aspiring UFC fighter who lacked the connections to make his dream a reality.

So I connected him with two LEGENDS of the game. Now, he’s training with some of the best fighters in the world on his way to the UFC. 

Think he’ll make it? Full story out now on my channel! 

Thank you to @tomaspinallofficial and @SugaSeanUFC for helping Jonathan get one step closer to his dream!

items.channel_label: Jack Roberts — UK tech founder, 7-figure AI automation business
items.title: I Tested the Fable 5 Killer (Hermes Agent)
items.description:
📈 ALL Systems: https://bit.ly/4kol0y5
🩵 Free Resources: https://bit.ly/3RNNDLa
🔥 Type with your voice: https://bit.ly/4eGoI3R

Two models have been claiming to kill Claude Fable 5 in the last week, so I put both through real tests inside Hermes agent. Sakana Fugu is an intelligent router that secretly orchestrates a pool of frontier models behind one API, while GLM 5.2 is an open workhorse from China at a sixth of the cost. I run them against Opus 4.8 on tool calling, building a one page website, and improving the Hermes operating system. The results genuinely surprised me, especially how GLM 5.2 held up. I also walk through the exact model routing strategy I'm using going forward.

*Core Software*
🤖 Hermes Agent
🐟 Sakana Fugu
🧠 GLM 5.2
☁️ Claude: https://claude.ai/
🐳 DeepSeek: https://www.deepseek.com/
🔌 Zapier MCP
🔥 Glaido: https://bit.ly/4eGoI3R

⌚️ Stamps:
00:00 - Two Models Killed Fable?
00:36 - The Game Of Thrones Problem
01:48 - How Sakana Fugu Works
03:01 - GLM 5.2 The Open Workhorse
03:48 - Connecting Sakana To Hermes
04:46 - Testing Sakana Out
05:40 - Connecting GLM 5.2
06:30 - Checking GLM Works
07:15 - Test One Tool Calling
09:07 - Tool Calling Results
10:05 - Test Two One Page Website
11:01 - Comparing The Websites
13:53 - Test Three Hardest Yet
15:16 - The Build Results
16:09 - Fugu Is Not A Fable Killer
17:02 - The Routing Strategy I Use
18:33 - Why GLM 5.2 Impressed Me

I tested Sakana Fugu and GLM 5.2 against Claude Opus 4.8 inside the Hermes agent to see which model is actually best for tool calling, building websites and coding, plus how to connect them with Open Router and Zapier MCP.


#HermesAgent #GLM52 #SakanaFugu #ClaudeOpus #AIAgents #AIModels

Everyone thinks these videos were filmed. They weren't. Not one camera, not one set, not one actor, every shot was built with AI on a laptop. In this video I break down the entire workflow behind millions of views: how to write the prompt, which AI image and video tools actually win, the one move that makes a fake shot feel real, and how to put your OWN face inside any of these worlds with no green screen and no reshoots.

items.title: Choose Between Some Jobs Lost or All Jobs Lost
items.description:
A lot of entrepreneurship comes down to being able to look an existential threat in the eyes with equal parts dread and enthusiasm. 

And going from “this is gonna end us” to “we can turn this into a win” as fast as possible.

items.title: The Wildest Things I Saw Vibe Coded With Fable 5
items.description:
I messed up. 

Everyone has been talking about the drama that went down around Claude Fable and Mythos getting shut down, including myself. But I got distracted from the REAL story here, which is just how crazy good these models were and the amazing things people were able to build with them.  

These are just a few examples, but it's insane that people built full scale projects and business ideas and NONE of them were engineers with massive dev budgets. They were just regular people with a good idea. 

What used to require a full development team and months of work now takes a single afternoon and a good AI model. We are watching in real time a massive shift in WHO gets to build things. 

But of course, the party was cut short because Anthropic was ordered to suspend foreign access to Fable 5 over security concerns, literally describing their own tech as "too powerful." 

And I get why that sounds terrifying. But look at what people actually did with it in the short window they had: they solved problems, built businesses, and created cool things to share with the world. That’s what happens when you put genuinely useful tech into the hands of the people. 

#Claude #Anthropic #AI #Entrepreneurship #vibecoding

items.title: How to Use GLM 5.2 Inside Claude Code in 5 Minutes
items.description:
Learn how to make money with AI 👉 https://skool.com/aiworkshop

Video Prompts + Free Resource  👉 https://bit.ly/aiw-lite-about

Work with us to implement AI into your business 👉 https://bit.ly/AIW-Discovery-Call

Check out my AI Saas 👉 https://citevue.com

Settings.json code:

{
  "env": {
    "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL": "https://openrouter.ai/api",
    "ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN": "YOUR API KEY",
    "ANTHROPIC_MODEL": "z-ai/glm-5.2",
    "ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL": "z-ai/glm-5.2",
    "ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL": "z-ai/glm-5.2",
    "ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL": "z-ai/glm-5.2",
    "ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL": "z-ai/glm-5.2",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL": "z-ai/glm-5.2"
  }


In this video, I show you how to use GLM 5.2 inside Claude Code in just a few minutes.

GLM 5.2 is getting a lot of attention right now as an open-source AI coding model, and many people are testing it as an alternative to more expensive coding models. In this tutorial, I walk you through the simple setup process so you can connect GLM 5.2 to Claude Code and start using it for your own AI coding workflows.

We’ll go through the full setup step by step, including how to configure Claude Code, connect GLM 5.2 through OpenRouter, add your API key, and confirm that everything is working inside VS Code.

If you want to use GLM 5.2 for coding, vibe coding, agentic engineering, AI app building, or cheaper Claude Code workflows, this video will show you exactly how to get started.

By the end, you’ll know how to:

✅ Set up GLM 5.2 inside Claude Code
✅ Connect Claude Code with OpenRouter
✅ Add your API key correctly
✅ Use GLM 5.2 inside VS Code
✅ Start building with an open-source AI coding model

This is a quick setup tutorial for anyone who wants to try GLM 5.2 inside Claude Code without wasting time figuring out the configuration.
